items.title: Assessing American Express (AXP) Valuation After Strong Double Digit Revenue And Earnings Growth
items.description: Why American Express stock is back in focus after strong results American Express (AXP) has jumped back onto investors' radar after reporting double digit revenue and net income gains in Q4 and the full year, backed by heavier spending from affluent and younger cardholders. Luxury purchases, premium card fees and the company’s mix of issuing and merchant network activity are central to that story, and they are shaping how investors are sizing up the stock after the latest numbers. See our...

items.description: The premium credit card entity just reported double-digit gains on the top and bottom lines in Q4.

items.title: Visa-UnionPay Link-Up: A Turning Point in Cross-Border Money Flow?
items.description: V links Visa Direct with UnionPay's MoneyExpress, opening cross-border payouts to 95% of UPI debit cards in China via one integration.

items.title: Could Buying American Express (AXP) Today Set You Up for Life?
items.description: The credit card and banking giant is still an evergreen investment.

items.title: The John Bogle Method for Building a Dividend Portfolio Under $10,000
items.description: John Bogle, the legendary Vanguard Group founder and index fund pioneer, left an enduring legacy of knowledge and inspiration. He was wealthy, of course, but you can apply Bogle’s dividend investment principles with $10,000 or less. Plenty of today’s investors are enamored with high-yield stocks, but Bogle didn’t over-focus on the biggest dividends. Instead, he ... The John Bogle Method for Building a Dividend Portfolio Under $10,000
